title: poa calycina var. calycina
intro: Poa calycina var. calycina, also known as alpine meadow grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Poa calycina var. calycina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
